source.label: GitHub Actions runtime-parity artifact from PR #556 run 28329962771

rows.rootCause: PDFTextStripper line grouping differs around math formula fragments with superscript/subscript-style positioning. Java emits a line break between the exponent and the following model label; PdfBox.Net keeps the same text on one line. The stripped text content is identical after the reviewed math-linewrap whitespace normalization.

PDFTextStripper word-separator heuristics differ at a punctuation operator boundary in typeset C code. Java inserts a separator before the increment operator while PdfBox.Net keeps the operator adjacent. The stripped text content is identical after the reviewed punctuation-spacing normalization.
